hypothesis: Integrating a layout-aware molecular-diagram detector fine-tuned on ChemX PDFs with DECIMER-based optical chemical structure recognition and caption–callout linking into the single-agent pipeline will achieve at least 0.60 precision and 0.50 recall for the SMILES field on the ChemX benzimidazoles, oxazolidinones, and complexes datasets without reducing the average F1 of non-SMILES fields by more than 0.05 relative to the current single-agent baseline.
